name: weather
description: Get current weather and forecasts with no API key required.

prompts.system: Use this skill when the user asks for current weather, temperature, rain likelihood, or a short forecast for a specific city, region, or airport code. Prefer wttr.in for quick text output and Open-Meteo for JSON workflows. Do not use this skill for severe weather alerts, historical climate analysis, aviation briefings, or marine forecasts. No API key is required.
